stories.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran’s military mocks Trump’s claims of ceasefire talks, strikes Gulf states overnight
stories.summary: Iran fired missiles at Israeli and US bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain overnight, with military spokesman sarcastically asking if the US is "negotiating with yourselves" after Trump's ceasefire claims.

stories.title: US set to send airborne troops to Middle East as Trump claims talks with Iran taking place
stories.summary: The US is deploying airborne troops to the Middle East as Iran strikes Gulf states, while Tehran denies any negotiations with Washington.

stories.title: Thousands of U.S. troops deploy to Middle East. And, the latest on DHS funding talks
stories.summary: Thousands of paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne are deploying to the Middle East as the conflict escalates.

stories.title: Most Americans say US military action against Iran has gone too far, a new AP-NORC poll finds
stories.summary: A new AP-NORC poll finds most Americans think US military action against Iran has gone too far.

stories.title: Large Polymarket, Wall Street bets on Trump’s war news under scrutiny
stories.summary: Critics are questioning whether the White House engaged in insider trading after large, well-timed bets on Iran war news appeared on Polymarket and Wall Street this week.

stories.title: Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz is an international crisis
stories.summary: Iran has closed the Strait of Hormuz, creating an international crisis that requires urgent action.

stories.title: ‘A heinous crime’: Air strikes kill seven fighters in Iraq’s Anbar
stories.summary: US airstrikes killed seven Iran-aligned PMF fighters in Iraq's Anbar province, escalating attacks on Iranian proxies.

stories.title: UK police arrest 2 men over arson attack on ambulances belonging to a Jewish charity
stories.summary: UK police arrested two men over an arson attack on ambulances belonging to Jewish charity Hatzola Northwest in London.

stories.title: Russia says it shot down almost 400 Ukrainian drones as Moscow and Kyiv escalate aerial barrages
stories.summary: Russia claims it shot down 389 Ukrainian drones as both sides escalate aerial bombardments.

stories.title: US Democrats condemn war on Iran as Senate resolution fails
stories.summary: A Senate resolution to end US attacks on Iran failed 47-53, with Democrats condemning the war.

stories.title: US talking to itself, says Iran as Trump claims wheels of diplomacy turning
stories.summary: Iranian officials continue denying any peace talks despite reports the US sent a ceasefire proposal, saying America is "talking to itself."

stories.title: ‘Do not call your defeat an agreement’ IRGC warns US, Israel
stories.summary: Iran's IRGC warned the US and Israel to "not call your defeat an agreement," rejecting Trump's claims about ongoing talks.

stories.title: Conservatives gather for CPAC with the right openly divided over the Iran war
stories.summary: Conservative Republicans are openly divided over the Iran war as they gather for CPAC, exposing rifts in Trump's base.

stories.title: Oil falls more than 4% and Asian shares gain over Trump’s talk of negotiations with Iran
stories.summary: Oil prices fell more than 4% and Asian shares gained after Trump talked about Iran negotiations, showing markets' desperation for any peace signal.

stories.title: Iran’s new security boss Mohammad Zolghadr: Why his appointment matters
stories.summary: Iran appointed ex-IRGC commander Mohammad Zolghadr as new security chief to manage external US-Israeli pressure and internal unrest.
